options.text: I might come if I finish my work.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Absolutely! Can't wait!' 表达了明确的确认和积极态度，符合礼貌道别确认场景。其他选项都表现出犹豫或不确定性，与场景要求的坚定确认相悖。

content.speakerText: Awesome! See you Saturday then — don't be late!
content.speakerTextCn: 太棒了！周六见啊，别迟到！

options.text: No way I'd miss it — see you then!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No way I'd miss it — see you then!' 既回应了对方的提醒，又用轻松语气表达感谢和承诺，符合礼貌道别语境。其他选项或消极、或不礼貌，不符合场景要求。

content.speakerText: Thanks for hosting — I really appreciate it!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你举办这场聚会，我真的很感激！

options.text: Of course! It was my pleasure — have a safe trip home!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Of course! It was my pleasure — have a safe trip home!' 不仅礼貌回应感谢，还主动表达关心，体现了完整的道别礼仪。'Don't mention it' 虽然常见，但略显冷淡，不适合主动表达感激的语境。其他选项不礼貌或消极。

content.template: I'll be there at ___ on Saturday — thanks again!
content.hint: 确认出席时重复关键信息（如时间）更显认真
content.knowledgePoint: 重复关键信息以示确认（场景核心表达）

content.template: No way I'd ___ it — see you then!
content.hint: 表达‘不可能错过’的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配 'miss it'（错过某事）

content.template: Thanks so much for inviting me — I really ___ it!
content.hint: 表达感激的正式且自然的动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配 'appreciate it'（表达感谢）

expectedAnswers: Yes, I'll be there! Thanks for inviting me.
Absolutely! I'm already looking forward to it — see you at 8pm on Maple St!
Definitely! I’ve got it marked on my calendar — can’t wait!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认出席，无模糊表达
语言准确性：语法正确，时态使用恰当
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，语气积极
关键词覆盖：包含时间、地点或感谢语

content.speakerText: Awesome! See you Saturday then — don't be late!
content.speakerTextCn: 太棒了！周六见啊，别迟到！
expectedAnswers: Haha, I'll be there early with snacks!
No chance I'll be late — thanks for having me!
Got it! I’ll set a reminder — see you Saturday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应提醒并承诺准时
语言准确性：使用恰当的否定结构（no chance, won't）
表达自然度：语气轻松，符合朋友间对话风格
关键词覆盖：包含感谢、时间或幽默元素

content.speakerText: Thanks for the invitation — I had a wonderful time!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你邀请我，我玩得很开心！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! I'm glad you enjoyed it — take care!
It was my pleasure! Let’s do this again soon!
Thank you for saying that — I hope to see you again soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应感谢并表达积极期待
语言准确性：使用恰当的感谢回应句型
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合社交结束语境
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应、未来期待或告别语
